hypotheses.title: GMM Analysis of Cryo-EM OMV Populations Distinguishes Biogenesis Pathways
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: Gaussian Mixture Model with BIC model selection applied to cryo-EM OMV descriptors. Tests discrete vs continuous heterogeneity. K>=3 predicts distinct biogenesis pathways. delta-ompA validation.

hypotheses.title: Power Analysis for Subtomogram Averaging of OMV Budding Intermediates Sets Feasibility Boundary
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: Theoretical N_min calculation for budding site subtomogram averaging. Pilot dataset of 20 tilt series to empirically validate yield. Predicts 200-500 subtomograms needed, requiring 70-170 hours microscope time.

hypotheses.title: Periplasmic Chaperone DegP/Skp Co-localization with OMV Cargo via Cryo-ET Difference Mapping
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: Cryo-ET difference mapping (WT minus delta-degP) identifies DegP-dependent density at budding sites and in OMV lumen. Tests chaperone-mediated cargo sorting model. delta-surA control for specificity.

hypotheses.title: ML-Guided Template Matching Identifies OMV Cargo Proteins In Situ Without Labels
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: DeePiCt/TomoTwin template matching against P. aeruginosa OMP structures identifies per-OMV cargo composition. Clusters OMVs by OMP ratios. Validates with proteomics and knockout.

hypotheses.title: Time-Resolved Cryo-EM of OMV Biogenesis Using Rapid Mixing Captures Cargo Loading Intermediates
hypotheses.mechanism_summary: Microfluidic mixing-spraying with EDTA stress trigger + plunge vitrification at 5 timepoints. Captures temporal sequence: curvature initiation -> cargo accumulation -> scission -> release.
